# cloudflare_ai_gateway_dynamic_routing (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_ai_gateway_dynamic_routing" "example_ai_gateway_dynamic_routing" {
  account_id = "0d37909e38d3e99c29fa2cd343ac421a"
  gateway_id = "54442216"
  id = "54442216"
}
```
